privileged_info_summary: The sales_kpi_dashboard task operates on real, locally-sourced structured data: sales_data.csv contains 1000 rows of sales transactions across 14 columns including Product_ID, Sale_Date, Sales_Rep, Region, Sales_Amount, Quantity_Sold, Product_Category, Unit_Cost, Unit_Price, Customer_Type, Discount, Payment_Method, Sales_Channel, and a computed Region_and_Sales_Rep column. Data spans four regions (North, South, East, West), five sales reps (Alice, Bob, Charlie, David, Eve), four product categories (Electronics, Clothing, Food, Furniture), and two sales channels (Online, Retail). Total Sales_Amount across all transactions is 5,019,265.23 and total Quantity_Sold is 25,355 units. The task requires building a Power BI report with two pages named 'Overview' and 'Regional Detail' containing specific visual types (Card, Donut chart, Clustered Bar chart, Slicer) and two DAX measures (Total_Revenue, Total_Units). The output file must be saved as Sales_KPI_Dashboard.pbix on the Desktop. All metadata claims about file location, page names, visual types, measures, and source data have been independently verified.
